wiki_ingest._comment_wiki_base: REQUIRED: absolute path to the directory that holds your wikis. No hardcoded default — leave empty and wiki ingest/search will refuse to run.
wiki_ingest._comment_memforge: ingest 完成后是否调用 memforge 增量刷新向量索引；默认关闭，保持现有 local 行为不变
wiki_ingest._comment_memforge_script: REQUIRED when memforge_reindex_enabled=true: absolute path to memforge.sh. No hardcoded default.

wiki_search._comment_backend: local = 现有行为，让 LLM 从 index.md 中选页；memforge = 走 memforge 向量检索。memforge 失败会自动降级为 local。
wiki_search._comment_memforge_script: REQUIRED when backend=memforge: absolute path to memforge.sh. No hardcoded default.
